{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Larian's armor
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|An army of ten thousand [[Gold]]-ranked [[sacred artists]] could not scratch [[Larian's armor]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
